title: Enumeration Values
description: Centralized collection of enumeration values used across the schema

location_type.title: Location Type
location_type.description: The type of location: physical, postal, or virtual.

service_status.title: Service Status
service_status.description: The current status of the service.

frequency.title: Frequency
frequency.description: iCal (RFC 5545) - How often the frequency repeats.

byday.title: By Day
byday.description: iCal (RFC 5545) - Comma separated days of the week using ISO 8601 abbreviations. When freq is MONTHLY each part can be preceded by a positive or negative integer to represent occurrence in month (e.g. 2MO = second Monday, -1FR = last Friday).

format.title: Response Format
format.description: The format for API response data.
